Viveak Harvey.
Quantity surveying / commercial control / AI-enabled workflow

Commercial clarity for projects across multiple regions and sectors.

Experienced quantity surveyor with expertise in variation analysis, BOQ preparation, and full-cycle project management. With a track record spanning the GCC and India across healthcare, oil & gas, defense, and commercial sectors, I deliver accurate commercial control and work order management. Proficient in AutoCAD, Revit, and Primavera P6, I also use AutoCAD plugins, Python BBS optimizers, and Power BI dashboards to improve speed, accuracy, and project visibility.

Experience Timeline
Roles that shaped me into a professional quantity surveyor

Timeline view fo my professional experience.

Sept 2025 - Present
Quantity Surveyor - Pre Contract
Prime One Group / Kuwait City, Kuwait
Current role
  • Prepared BOQs using CSI format and drafted procurement documents aligned to ASTM standards.
  • Issued and followed up RFQs with GCC vendors and subcontractors for complete, comparable quotations.
  • Maintained Statements of Work, vendor databases, and scope clarification workflows.
Oct 2024 - Sept 2025
Quantity Surveyor
Gulf Asia Engineering and Projects / Chennai, India
GCC project support
  • Produced measurement sheets for architecture, steel, BBS, UG services, and precast buildings.
  • Improved drafting efficiency by creating dynamic blocks and used Power Automate to summarise 300+ pricing sheets.
  • Supported Revit-based 3D rebar clarity for BBS coordination and scope checks.
Mar 2024 - Sept 2024
Quantity Surveyor - Civil & MEP
Engineering Maintenance Company (EMCO) / Dukhan, Qatar
Maintenance
  • Developed BOQs for client renovation and maintenance requirements.
  • Automated invoice entry using Power Automate and created projected cost plans for 700+ open notifications.
  • Raised queries during site visits to resolve requirement conflicts and cost gaps.
Apr 2022 - Feb 2024
Quantity Surveyor - Civil & MEP
BNR Infrastructure Projects Pvt Ltd / Chennai, India
Healthcare project
  • Led billing and quantity take-offs for the Government Kilpauk Medical College Hospital project valued at Rs. 169 crores.
  • Managed billing coordination for 23 subcontractors and supported variation, escalation, and EOT documentation.
  • Worked across MEP, ELV, vendor coordination, document transmittals, and risk-oriented profit/loss statements.
Oct 2020 - Mar 2022
Jr. Quantity Surveyor
Lines and Curves Engineering Inc. / Coimbatore, India
First role
  • Generated DLRs, DPRs, JMRs, MOMs, and labour outturn reports for clubhouse and housing projects.
  • Assisted senior quantity surveyors and project management with site reporting and progress tracking.
